story: Detective Elijah Crain vowed to stop the south-side murders. Sergeant Dana Rowen recorded notes and handed out butterscotch. After Emma Darcy died with a butterscotch in her airway, Crain fixated on Rowen; Leah Mercer later vanished. Crain unraveled and was jailed. One quiet evening, Martin Nelson, the gentle night guard, walked home and unlocked his basement door; in the dark below, Leah Mercer lifted her head.
implausible_knowledge: in the dark below, Leah Mercer lifted her head
question: A few days later, as Rowen plans the next sweep for Leah Mercer, what will she most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Obtain a warrant and search Martin Nelson’s basement immediately.
answer_without_knowledge: Continue standard leads review and organize another river search.
